VAL-APP-001.description: El informe incluye un template de SKILL.md listo para usar.

verifiedComponents: YAML frontmatter with required fields (name, description)
All required body sections (Role, Procedure, Examples, Success Criteria, Limitations)
HTML comments with guidance for each placeholder
Fenced code block format for easy copying

notes: This is a documentation mission with no services. Validation performed via manual review of the produced document. Template guide is comprehensive, well-structured, and ready for immediate use.
